_note: Rubric from sentinel/fixtures/gate/expected-findings.md. Witness (the Gate skill) is UNUSUAL: its decision rule is deterministic code (witness.mjs), covered by a golden truth-table self-test (`node sentinel/skills/gate/witness.mjs --self-test`, gated in CI). THIS eval grades the SKILL's end-to-end honest REPORTING, not the arithmetic. Case = /gate on a PASSED Playwright report + a present (opaque) audit-test report → the deterministic gate returns `canary` (human-must-read floor). The skill must present that decision as-is, show its work, frame it advisory, note `ship` is unreachable in v0, and NOT fabricate a confidence number or certify `ship`. `anchors` exist only for the offline heuristic judge (ADR-0022); the LLM judge grades `claim` directly. Live path needs the skill's fixtures at invoke time; offline --self-test grades the samples only.

must_surface.claim: Presents the deterministic `canary` decision and explains it floored there because the audit-test report is present but opaque — a human must read it before shipping (the credibility axis floor).
Shows its work — records each input's proposed category so the worst-wins arithmetic is reconstructable (playwright proposed ship, audit-test proposed canary, worst-wins → canary).
Frames the decision as advisory / report-first — it did not fail the build.
States that `ship` is unreachable in v0 by design (canary is the honest ceiling while audit-test is opaque), rather than treating canary as a downgrade.
Makes clear Witness ingested existing evidence and did not run the suite or launch a browser.

must_not.claim: Must NOT certify `ship` — it is unreachable in v0 while audit-test is opaque; certifying it would be exactly the false confidence Witness exists to prevent.
Must NOT fabricate a confidence number, or override / green-lock the deterministic decision — the gate carries no number and the skill does not recompute or overrule it.
